description: WebRTC Signaling Package - Create packages/webrtc/ with real WebSocket-based signaling server (offer/answer/ICE exchange), room manager with participant tracking, client-side peer connection helper, and wire into quantmeet backend replacing fake ICE candidates.
steps: Create packages/webrtc/package.json with @quant/webrtc name, dependencies on ws, zod, pino, @quant/common. Include browser-safe exports field for client code.
Create packages/webrtc/src/types.ts - RTCSignalMessage (offer/answer/ice-candidate/join/leave types), Room, Participant, SignalingConfig, PeerConnectionConfig types

Create packages/webrtc/src/room-manager.ts - RoomManager class: createRoom(), joinRoom(roomId, participant), leaveRoom(roomId, participantId), getRoom(roomId), listRooms(), cleanupStaleRooms(). Uses Map internally, emits events on join/leave/close.

Create packages/webrtc/src/signaling-server.ts - SignalingServer class: attaches to existing WebSocket server, handles message routing (offer -> forward to target peer, answer -> forward back, ice-candidate -> relay to peer). Uses RoomManager for room state. Validates all messages with zod.

Create packages/webrtc/src/client.ts - Browser-safe PeerConnectionManager: createPeerConnection(config), handleOffer(sdp), createOffer(), handleAnswer(sdp), addIceCandidate(candidate), onTrack callback, onIceCandidate callback. Exports useWebRTC hook pattern (React hook shape without React dep).
Create packages/webrtc/src/index.ts - export server-side APIs (SignalingServer, RoomManager, types)

Update apps/quantmeet/backend/routes/ws.ts to use SignalingServer from @quant/webrtc instead of manual room/connection management. Import and wire the signaling server to handle WebSocket connections.
Update apps/quantmeet/package.json to add @quant/webrtc as workspace dependency
Create packages/webrtc/src/__tests__/room-manager.test.ts - test room lifecycle (create, join, leave, cleanup)
acceptance_criteria: packages/webrtc exports SignalingServer, RoomManager, and all types
SignalingServer handles offer/answer/ice-candidate messages and routes to correct peers
RoomManager tracks rooms and participants with create/join/leave/cleanup lifecycle
Client module exports PeerConnectionManager with createOffer/handleAnswer/addIceCandidate
All messages validated with zod schemas
Unit tests pass for room-manager and signaling-server
